title: Punctuating lists
description: Use commas to punctuate lists of things and actions!

assessment_items.question_content:
**Punctuate the different elements of this list by putting commas in the right places.**

The fruit basket was brimming with mangoes pears and apricots.

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
When making a list, we should place a comma between items in the list:

>_At the grocery store I bought milk, eggs, and sugar._

At Khan Academy, we like to use the Oxford (or serial) comma, which means that we put a comma before the last item of a list.

The list should be punctuated as follows:

>**The fruit basket was brimming with mangoes, pears, and apricots.**

choices.content: The fruit basket was brimming with mangoes$\redD{,}$ pears$\redD{,}$ and apricots.
The fruit basket was brimming$\redD{,}$ with mangoes$\redD{,}$ pears$\redD{,}$ and apricots.
The fruit basket was brimming with mangoes pears$\redD{,}$ and apricots.
